NAME

stdin_buffer_t

SYNOPSIS

Data Fields


uint8_t * data
Buffered data (shared between decoders). size_t size
Total size of buffered data.

Detailed Description

Structure to track buffered stdin data

Definition at line 144 of file media/ffmpeg_decoder.c.
